activities_projects.title: Identifying Soldier’s Qualities
activities_projects.objective: Recognize the traits that make soldiers brave and responsible
steps: Underline or list the qualities of soldiers mentioned in the text
Discuss why these qualities are important
Write your observations in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the personality traits of soldiers
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy in identifying qualities and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Letter Reading and Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotions expressed in letters to soldiers
steps: Read the letter in the chapter carefully
Highlight expressions of courage, care, and hope
Discuss in pairs the feelings conveyed in the letter
Write a short paragraph summarizing your understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of summary and discussion participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Riddle / Word Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Develop logical thinking using words from the chapter
steps: Choose 5 words related to soldiers and bravery from the text
Create a simple word puzzle or riddle using these words
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct creation and solving of puzzles (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play: Letter Writing
steps: Imagine you are writing a reply to the letter in the chapter
Form pairs and act out reading the letter and your response
Discuss the emotions and qualities you included in your reply
activities_projects.evaluation: Expression, teamwork, and clarity in role play (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Paragraph Writing
steps: Write a short paragraph imagining a day in the life of a soldier
Include details about courage, challenges, and dedication
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance imagination and writing skills
